name: MCV_NCCR_origin
description: MCV non-coding control region (NCCR) / regulatory region: contains the viral origin of replication (a palindromic LT-antigen binding-site cluster + AT-rich early-palindrome + GC-rich late palindrome), the bidirectional early and late promoters, and host transcription-factor binding sites. JCV NCCR rearrangements (archetype vs PML-type 'Mad-1') are diagnostic for tissue tropism and pathogenicity — the archetype configuration found in urine is reorganized into tandemly-repeated 98-bp blocks in PML brain isolates. BKV NCCR rearrangements similarly distinguish urinary (archetype) from blood/kidney (rearranged) isolates in nephropathy.
expected_copy_count: 1 NCCR per genome; rearrangements duplicate or delete sub-blocks
